result:
Spaghetti = no structure. Fix:

**1. Small fn.** One job each. >20 lines = split. Name = what it do.

**2. Group by feature, not type.** `user/` folder hold user logic. Not `controllers/` + `models/` split everywhere.

**3. Kill deep nesting.** Early return. Guard clause top. Flat > pyramid.
```
if (!user) return null;
if (!user.active) return null;
// real work here
```

**4. Name things right.** `d` bad. `daysUntilExpiry` good. Bool start `is/has/can`.

**5. One layer per fn.** Don't mix HTTP parsing + DB query + email send in one blob. Fn call fn call fn.

**6. Delete dead code.** Unused = lie. Git remember.

**7. Types/interfaces.** Even in JS, JSDoc. Brain offload to compiler.

**8. Comment WHY not WHAT.** Code show what. Comment explain weird choice.

Start rule: when lost, extract. Pull 5 lines → named fn. Repeat til each fn fit in head.
